# Zentro Projects

> Zentro Projects (Pty) Ltd is a Gauteng-based specialist company providing overhead crane manufacturing, maintenance, load testing, lifting equipment inspections, and hoist repairs.

## About

Zentro Projects is your go-to partner for full-spectrum industrial lifting solutions. We manufacture, install, repair, and refurbish overhead cranes and lifting equipment. Based in Springs New, Gauteng (South Africa), our expert team has over 22 years of industry experience and services more than 500 cranes annually across Johannesburg and the East Rand. We are committed to maximizing uptime, safety, and asset lifespan for our clients across various industries including Glass, Steel, Utilities, Mining, and Petrochemicals.

## Services

- **Overhead Cranes** — Design, manufacturing, and installation of Single Girder and Double Girder cranes.
- **Lifting Equipment** — Supply and maintenance of Electric Wire Rope Hoists, Chain Slings, and Flat Webbing Slings.
- **Steel Fabrication** — Custom A-Frame Gantry Kits and heavy-duty Gantry Structures.
- **Maintenance & Repairs** — 24/7 Breakdown assistance, Crane Upgrades, comprehensive Load Testing, and Electrical Installations.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.zentro.co.za/): Main landing page detailing our industrial strength and global impact.
- [About Us](https://www.zentro.co.za/about-zentro-projects.html): Learn about our 22+ years of experience and our dedicated professional team.
- [Services](https://www.zentro.co.za/breakdowns-and-repairs.html): Comprehensive breakdown of our repair, maintenance, and inspection offerings.
- [Contact Us](https://www.zentro.co.za/contact-us.html): Get in touch for a quote, schedule an inspection, or request emergency breakdown assistance.
